paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced the Swin Transformer architecture with hierarchical feature extraction through shifted window self-attention, enabling linear computational complexity with respect to input image size while maintaining cross-window connectivity for improved modeling power
raw_extraction.parameters: Approximately equivalent to ViT-B/16 (~86M parameters, inferred from comparison)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose vision backbone for image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Vision transformer generalization for computer vision tasks like image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical patch-based self-attention with shifted windows
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced the Swin Transformer architecture with hierarchical feature extraction through shifted window self-attention, optimized for efficiency with ~0.25× parameters/flops of Swin-B, maintaining linear complexity with respect to input image size
raw_extraction.application: Lightweight vision backbone for edge devices and resource-constrained systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient vision transformer backbone for scalable deployment across vision tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical patch-based self-attention with shifted windows
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced the Swin Transformer architecture with hierarchical feature extraction through shifted window self-attention, optimized for balance between performance and efficiency (~0.5× parameters/flops of Swin-B)
raw_extraction.application: Standard vision backbone for most computer vision applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balanced vision transformer backbone for general-purpose vision tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical patch-based self-attention with shifted windows
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced the Swin Transformer architecture with hierarchical feature extraction through shifted window self-attention, optimized for highest performance (~2× parameters/flops of Swin-B)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced vision tasks requiring high accuracy
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-performance vision transformer backbone for advanced vision tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical patch-based self-attention with shifted windows
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the **shifted window self-attention** mechanism, enabling efficient hierarchical feature extraction without padding, improving computational efficiency across multiple stages. Uses relative position biases for improved positional awareness
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Vision transformer architectures with efficient hierarchical feature processing
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical feature extraction via shifted window self-attention
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K, COCO, and ADE20K datasets
raw_extraction.extension: Shifted window partitioning enables efficient hierarchical connections between windows through cyclic shifting, reducing padding overhead and maintaining throughput consistency across stages
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core architecture as Swin-T but with increased channel dimensions (C=96→192) for enhanced feature representation, leveraging shifted window partitioning for efficiency
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Vision transformer architectures with improved hierarchical feature processing
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical feature extraction via shifted window self-attention
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K, COCO, and ADE20K datasets
raw_extraction.extension: Increased channels (C=96→192) combined with shifted window partitioning improves feature granularity while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Enhanced hierarchical feature extraction with larger channel dimensions (C=128) and optimized shifted window partitioning, achieving superior performance through pre-training on ImageNet-22K before fine-tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ImageNet-22K (14.2M training images) and ImageNet-1K (for fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable vision transformers with hierarchical feature learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical feature extraction via shifted window self-attention
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Pre-training on ImageNet-22K followed by fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K
raw_extraction.extension: Multi-stage pre-training on ImageNet-22K followed by fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K maximizes hierarchical feature learning efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Highest-capacity Swin variant with largest channel dimensions (C=192) and optimized shifted window partitioning, achieving state-of-the-art performance through extensive pre-training on ImageNet-22K
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ImageNet-22K (14.2M training images) and ImageNet-1K (for fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Large-scale vision transformers with advanced hierarchical feature learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical feature extraction via shifted window self-attention
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Pre-training on ImageNet-22K followed by fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K
raw_extraction.extension: Combination of high channel dimensions (C=192) and cyclic-shifted window partitioning enables superior hierarchical feature extraction for complex visual tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.organization: Meta AI Research (formerly Facebook AI Research)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the Swin Transformer architecture, which uses **shifted window attention** to efficiently process local patches in a hierarchical manner, enabling long-range dependencies without quadratic complexity. Unlike traditional global self-attention, it divides the image into non-overlapping windows, reducing computational cost while maintaining high accuracy
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ImageNet-1K (and potentially ImageNet-22K for some variants, inferred from experimental setup)
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and general-purpose vision tasks
raw_extraction.license: Open-source (likely Apache 2.0 or similar, inferred from Meta AI Research practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient hierarchical vision transformation for image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical image classification (via patch-based transformer with shifted windows)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core architecture as Swin-T but with increased capacity (more channels/layers) for higher accuracy. Uses hierarchical patch merging/stages with progressively refined feature maps
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable vision transformer models balancing accuracy and efficiency
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical image classification (patch-based transformer with shifted windows)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Larger model variant with deeper layers and wider feature dimensions, optimized for high accuracy across multiple tasks. Leverages hierarchical patch merging and multi-stage refinement for robust feature extraction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ImageNet-1K (potentially extended to ImageNet-22K for some experiments)
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and advanced vision applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-performance vision transformers for complex vision tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical image classification (patch-based transformer with shifted windows)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Most computationally intensive variant with maximum layers/channels for peak accuracy. Combines hierarchical patch merging with multi-stage attention mechanisms to handle very large input resolutions efficiently
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ImageNet-22K (mentioned in experimental section for some variants)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced vision tasks including medical imaging, high-resolution segmentation, and specialized domain adaptation
raw_extraction.research_problem: State-of-the-art vision transformers for high-end vision tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Hierarchical image classification (patch-based transformer with shifted windows)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Hybrid architecture combining Swin Transformer's hierarchical patching with MLP-Mixer's global feature mixing. Uses shifted window attention for local context while integrating MLP-style global feature aggregation for improved efficiency and accuracy trade-offs
raw_extraction.application: Efficient image classification and lightweight vision models
raw_extraction.research_problem: Combining transformer and MLP-Mixer architectures for balanced efficiency and performance
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Similar hybrid architecture to Swin-Mixer-T but with greater capacity (61M params) for higher accuracy. Maintains Swin's hierarchical patching while adding MLP-Mixer's global feature mixing layers
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose vision tasks requiring moderate computational resources
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing transformer and MLP-Mixer architectures for optimal performance/efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces hierarchical vision transformers using shifted windows to efficiently process images at multiple scales, combining local window attention with global cross-window interactions
